calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2006 Continued To Jan-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Amended Notice Of Motion To Strike,Request For Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Firestone, Esq. of Vogel & Meredith, 415-398-0200 for defendant and moving party Sally Hays
Brett Pederson, Esq., 415-434-3101 for plaintiff and opposing party Lucia Paulazzo

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT SALLY HAYS' Amended Notice Of Motion To Strike, Request For Attorney Fees IS GRANTED PER CC 425.16 AS LETTER IS CONDUCT IN FURTHERANCE OF RIGHT OF FREE SPEECH IN CONNECTION WITHOUT ISSUE OR AN ISSUE OF PUBLIC INTEREST. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO CARRY HER BURDEN OF SHOWING A PROBABILITY SHE WILL PREVAIL ON THE MERITS. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL STATED IN OPEN COURT THAT PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION WAS NOT TIMELY FILED. AS A RESULT, THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT COUNSEL'S REQUEST TO STRIKE THE OPPOSITION. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189. (301/PJB/CK)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Firestone, Esq. of Vogel & Meredith, 415-398-0200 for defendant and moving party Sally Hays
Brett Pederson, Esq., 415-434-3101 for plaintiff and opposing party Lucia Paulazzo

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT SALLY HAYS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189. (301/PJB/CK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
